## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check src tests` passes
- [ ] `mypy src` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes (or `pytest -m "not generated"` if no network)
- [ ] If generated output changed, golden trees updated (`scripts/update_golden.py`)
- [ ] If contracts changed, specs updated
